scripts.deploy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json')); const d=new Date(); p.version=d.getFullYear()+'.'+(d.getMonth()+1)+'.'+d.getDate()+'-'+d.getHours()+'.'+d.getMinutes(); fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));" && npm run build && gh-pages -d dist
